title: Graphical Understanding of Convolution Operation
summary: This page introduces graphical convolution for continuous-time signals and explains why visual interpretation is useful for evaluating convolution integrals. It shows how to obtain g(t − τ) by time-reversing g(τ) to get g(−τ) and then shifting it, and interprets c(t) as the area under the product x(τ)g(t − τ).
